_publications._publicationTitle: Traditional and systems biology based drug discovery for the rare tumor syndrome neurofibromatosis type 2.

_contextSnippet: CUDC-907 was poorly tolerated, both at oral doses of 100 mg/kg/day and 50 mg/kg/day pointing to differences with the meningioma model. A dose of 25 mg/kg/day was tolerated
details: Poorly tolerated at both 100 mg/kg/day and 50 mg/kg/day oral doses in schwannoma model, but 25 mg/kg/day was tolerated
